title: Interaction Prototype Example
subtitle: Navigate a clickable flow with keyboard support.

sections.heading: Interaction Prototype in use
sections.body: This interaction prototype models a three-step export flow with anchorable states, decision copy, and visible success criteria.

cards.title: Choose template
cards.body: Start from the artifact type instead of a blank canvas.

cards.title: Tune payload
cards.body: Edit sections, sources, and interaction options.

cards.title: Export
cards.body: Render, validate, and open the generated HTML.

sections.heading: Choose template
sections.body: The first decision narrows layout, print behavior, and expected interaction affordances.

sections.heading: Tune payload
sections.body: The payload carries structured sections, cards, tables, code, diagrams, slides, and controls.

sections.heading: Export
sections.body: The final state is a single HTML file that can be attached, printed, or reviewed without a dev server.
